data.biography: 池慧元 （韩语：지혜원，1998年3月30日—），韩国女演员。因为在学校中的表演激发了她学习演戏的兴趣，后来进入了韩国艺术综合大学中就读，2019年与经纪公司Keyeast签约，并通过KBS电视剧《Justice》出道。
data.name: 池慧媛

data.biography: 池慧元 （韓語：지혜원，1998 年 3 月 30 日—），韓國女演員。因為在學校中的表演激發了她學習演戲的興趣，後來進入了韓國藝術綜合大學中就讀，2019 年與經紀公司 Keyeast 簽約，並通過 KBS 電視劇《Justice》出道。
data.name: 池慧元

data.biography: Ben Yuen Foo-Wah (Chinese: 袁富華) is known for Twilight's Kiss (2019), Tracey (2018) and The Eye (2002).
data.name: Ben Yuen Foo-Wah

data.biography:
袁富华，1964年2月12日出生于香港，中国香港男演员。

2018年9月，参演李骏硕执导的电影《翠丝》，11月，凭借该片获得第55届台湾电影金马奖最佳男配角奖、第38届香港电影金像奖最佳男配角奖。2019年，主演电影《叔·叔》获得第26届香港电影评论学会大奖最佳男演员提名。
data.name: 袁富华

data.biography:
袁富華，1964 年 2 月 12 日出生於香港，香港男演員。

2018 年 9 月，參演李駿碩執導的電影《翠絲》，11 月，憑借該片獲得第 55 屆台灣電影金馬獎最佳男配角獎、第 38 屆香港電影金像獎最佳男配角獎。2019 年，主演電影《叔・叔》獲得第 26 屆香港電影評論學會大獎最佳男演員提名。
data.name: 袁富華
Song Quỹ
data.overview: Trước 9 tuổi, Khương Mộ là cô em gái được yêu chiều, còn Cận Triều là anh trai tài năng. Sau khi cha mẹ ly hôn, Cận Triều theo cha sang Thái Lan, và Khương Mộ phát hiện anh chỉ là con nuôi. Quyết tâm tìm anh, cô đến Thái Lan, nơi Cận Triều giờ sống trong thế giới nguy hiểm. Khương Mộ không từ bỏ, hòa nhập vào cuộc sống của gia đình và giúp Cận Triều vượt qua khó khăn. Cô trở thành người đồng hành lý tưởng của anh. Sau một biến cố, họ chia xa, nhưng nhiều năm sau, họ tái ngộ ở Nam Kinh và tiếp tục hành trình song song đầy ý nghĩa. Cả hai cùng tỏa sáng, không còn xa cách.

data.biography:
Jemma Rebecca Redgrave (* 14. Januar 1965 in London, England) ist eine britische Schauspielerin.

Jemma Redgrave stammt aus einer bekannten Schauspielfamilie. Ihr Vater ist der Schauspieler Corin Redgrave. Ihre Tanten Lynn Redgrave und Vanessa Redgrave sowie ihre Cousinen Natasha Richardson und Joely Richardson sind ebenfalls als Schauspieler bekannt. Ihre Großeltern sind Michael Redgrave und Rachel Kempson.

Im Alter von 18 Jahren wurde Redgrave auf der London Academy of Music and Dramatic Art angenommen. Nach Abschluss ihrer Schauspielausbildung ging Redgrave zunächst ans Theater. Ihre erste Rolle spielte sie im Theaterstück Lady Windemere's Fan in Belfast, Nordirland. Es folgten Auftritte am Londoner West End. Unter anderem spielte Redgrave Emily in Our Town und war, neben ihren Tanten Vanessa und Lynn, im Theaterstück The Three Sisters zu sehen. Es folgten weitere Theaterauftritte und kleinere Film- und Fernsehauftritte.

Von 1995 bis 1998 spielte sie die Hauptrolle der Dr. Eleanor Bramwell in der Fernsehserie Bramwell. Hierdurch erlangte sie eine größere Bekanntheit.

2010 war Redgrave im Theaterstück The Great Game: Afghanistan zu sehen.

Von 2012 bis 2015 spielte Redgrave die Rolle der Kate Stewart in der Science-Fiction-Serie Doctor Who. Sie übernahm die Rolle von Beverley Cressman, die Kate Stewart bereits in den Filmen Downtime und Dæmos Rising spielte. Redgrave spricht Kate Stewart erneut in der Big Finish Hörbuchreihe UNIT: Extinction, die sich um Kate und ihr Leben bei der Geheimorganisation UNIT dreht.

2013 bekam Redgrave die Hauptrolle der Dr Evans in der britischen Fernsehserie Frankie. 2015 wurde bekannt gegeben, dass Redgrave eine Chirurgin in der britischen Seifenoper Holby City spielen wird.

Jemima (Jemma) Rebecca Redgrave (born 14 January 1965) is a fourth-generation English actress of the Redgrave family. She played the title character in four series of Bramwell. As well as a career in television, she has appeared in many onstage productions and on film, including her portrayal of Evie Wilcox in the BAFTA-award winning Merchant Ivory adaptation of Howards End.

She is the daughter of actor Corin Redgrave and his first wife Deirdre Hamilton-Hill. They divorced when Jemma was nine.

She is the granddaughter of Sir Michael Redgrave and Rachel Kempson, and the niece of actresses Vanessa Redgrave and Lynn Redgrave, and cousin of Joely Richardson, Carlo Nero and Natasha Richardson.
data.name: Jemma Redgrave

data.biography: Jemma Redgrave (14 de enero de 1965, Londres, Inglaterra) es una actriz británica.

data.overview: Jeanine là một đạo diễn sân khấu nghiêm túc và tận tâm. Khi được mời dàn dựng lại vở opera Salome nổi tiếng của người thầy cũ, cô phải đối mặt với những ký ức u ám từng bị chôn giấu. Trở lại với thế giới sân khấu sau nhiều năm rút lui, Jeanine dần nhận ra quá khứ đau thương vẫn còn đè nặng, và bắt đầu ảnh hưởng đến mọi thứ cô đang làm.
data.title: Bảy Tấm Màn Che

data.name: ภวัต สิริธีรภัคกุล

data.biography:
Elizabeth Shaila Koshy (born March 31, 1996) is an American YouTuber, media personality and actress. Her main channel has amassed almost 17 million subscribers, and her two channels have over 3 billion views combined. She has received four Streamy Awards, four Teen Choice Awards, and a Kids' Choice Award.

Koshy began her career on Vine in 2013 before starting a YouTube channel. She made her acting debut as Aday Walker in Tyler Perry's horror comedy film Boo! A Madea Halloween (2016). She went on to star as Violet Adams in the horror drama series Freakish (2016–2017) and The Explorer in the YouTube Premium mystery series Escape the Night (2017–2019). She was also a correspondent for the MTV television series Total Request Live (2017–2018).

Koshy co-created, produced and starred as the title character in the YouTube Premium comedy series Liza on Demand (2018–2021), which earned her several accolades, and hosted the Nickelodeon game show revival Double Dare(2018–2019), for which she received a Daytime Emmy Award nomination. She starred in the Netflix dance comedy film Work It (2020). She had voice roles in the animated adventure film My Little Pony: A New Generation (2021) and the science fiction film Transformers: Rise of the Beasts (2023).

Koshy was included in the 2019 Forbes 30 Under 30 Hollywood & Entertainment list, the Time 2019 list of the 25 Most Influential People on the Internet and its 100 Next list that same year.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Liza Koshy, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Liza Koshy

data.biography:
Elizabeth Shaila Koshy est une actrice, animatrice de télévision, comédienne et YouTubeuse américaine. Elle a commencé sa carrière sur Vine en 2013, avant de lancer une chaîne YouTube.

Parmi ses rôles d'actrice, citons Aday Walker dans la comédie d'horreur de Tyler Perry Boo! A Madea Halloween (2016) et The Explorer dans la série YouTube Premium Escape the Night (2017). Elle a joué le rôle de Violet Adams dans la série télévisée dramatique Hulu Freakish (2016-2017). De 2017 à 2018, elle a contribué à la série télévisée MTV Total Request Live. Depuis 2018, Koshy a produit et joué le rôle principal de la série humoristique YouTube Premium Liza on Demand. De 2018 à 2019, elle a animé le renouveau du jeu télévisé Nickelodeon Double Dare, pour lequel elle a reçu une nomination aux Emmy Awards. En 2020, elle a joué dans le film de comédie de danse Netflix Work It.

La principale chaîne YouTube de Koshy compte plus de 17 millions d'abonnés et ses deux chaînes totalisent plus de 2,5 milliards de vues combinées. Elle a reçu quatre Streamy Awards, quatre Teen Choice Awards et un Kids' Choice Award. Elle a été incluse dans la liste 2019 Forbes 30 Under 30 Hollywood & Entertainment et la liste Time 2019 des 25 personnes les plus influentes sur Internet et sa liste 2019 100 Next.

Elizabeth Shaila Koshy（1996 年 3 月 31 日出生）是美国女演员、电视节目主持人、喜剧演员和 YouTuber。她于 2013 年在 Vine 上开始了她的职业生涯，之后开设了一个 YouTube 频道。

她的表演角色包括泰勒·佩里（Tyler Perry）的恐怖喜剧电影《嘘！A Madea 万圣节 （2016） 和 YouTube Premium 系列 Escape the Night （2017） 中的 The Explorer。她在 Hulu 电视剧《怪胎》（2016-2017 年）中饰演维奥莱特·亚当斯。从 2017 年到 2018 年，她是 MTV 电视连续剧 Total Request Live 的撰稿人。自 2018 年以来，Koshy 制作并主演了 YouTube Premium 喜剧系列《Liza on Demand》。从 2018 年到 2019 年，她主持了 Nickelodeon 游戏节目复兴 Double Dare，并因此获得了艾美奖提名。2020年，她出演了Netflix的舞曲电影《Work It》。
data.name: 丽莎·科希

data.biography: Η Λίζα Κόσι (Liza Koshy) είναι Αμερικανίδα YouTuber, προσωπικότητα των μέσων ενημέρωσης και ηθοποιός. Το κύριο κανάλι της στο YouTube έχει συγκεντρώσει σχεδόν 17 εκατομμύρια συνδρομητές και τα δύο κανάλια της έχουν συνολικά πάνω από 3 δισεκατομμύρια προβολές.
data.name: Λίζα Κόσι

data.biography:
麗莎·科希（1996 年 3 月 31 日出生）是美國女演員、電視節目主持人、喜劇演員和 YouTuber。她於 2013 年在 Vine 上開始了她的職業生涯，之後開設了一個 YouTube 頻道。

她的表演角色包括泰勒·佩裏（Tyler Perry）的恐怖喜劇電影《噓！A Madea 萬聖節 （2016） 和 YouTube Premium 系列 Escape the Night （2017） 中的 The Explorer。她在 Hulu 電視劇《怪胎》（2016 - 2017 年）中飾演維奧萊特·亞當斯。從 2017 年到 2018 年，她是 MTV 電視聯續劇 Total Request Live 的撰稿人。自 2018 年以來，Koshy 製作並主演了 YouTube Premium 喜劇系列《Liza on Demand》。從 2018 年到 2019 年，她主持了 Nickelodeon 遊戲節目復興 Double Dare，並因此獲得了艾美獎提名。2020 年，她出演了 Netflix 的舞曲電影《Work It》。
data.name: 麗莎·科希

data.biography:
Elizabeth Shaila „Liza“ Koshy (* 31. März 1996 in Houston, Texas) ist eine amerikanische Medienpersönlichkeit, die sich als YouTuberin, Schauspielerin, Produzentin und Entertainerin einen Namen gemacht hat. Sie begann 2013 auf der Plattform Vine mit komödiantischen Videos, wurde dort sehr populär und gründete 2015 einen YouTube-Kanal, der schnell wuchs und Millionen von Abonnenten gewann. Bekannt wurde sie durch ihre Comedy und unterschiedliche Charaktere auf YouTube, etwa das männliche Alter Ego Jet Packinski.

Koshy studierte zunächst Business-Marketing, brach das Studium aber ab, um sich auf ihre Karriere als Influencerin und Schauspielerin zu konzentrieren. Ihre Schauspielkarriere begann 2016 mit der Rolle der Violet Adams in der Hulu-Horrorserie „Freakish“. Sie spielte auch Hauptrollen in ihrer eigenen YouTube-Premium-Comedyserie „Liza on Demand“ (2018–2021) und war Moderatorin der Nickelodeon-Show „Double Dare“. Zu ihren Filmrollen gehören „Boo! A Madea Halloween“ (2016), die Netflix-Tanzkomödie „Work It“ (2020) sowie Sprechrollen in „My Little Pony: Eine neue Generation“ (2021) und „Transformers: Aufstieg der Bestien“ (2023).

Liza Koshy wurde 2019 in Forbes' „30 Under 30“ und in der Time-Liste der einflussreichsten Personen im Internet aufgenommen. Sie zählt zu den erfolgreichen Influencern, die ihren Weg von Social Media auf YouTube hin zu Film und Fernsehen geschafft haben.

Aktor. Pierwsze kroki w zawodzie aktora stawiał w Teatrze Dzieci Zagłębia w Będzinie (1996-97), następnie trafił na Scenę Polską Teatru Cieszyńskiego w Czeskim Cieszynie (1997-2000). W 2000 roku współpracował z wrocławskim Teatrem Osobowym Roberta Czechowskiego. W latach 2001-2006 aktor Teatru im. Wojciecha Bogusławskiego w Kaliszu, w latach 2006-2008 Starego Teatru w Krakowie. Od roku 2008 występuje w Teatrze Rozmaitości w Warszawie. [filmpolski]
data.name: Sebastian Pawlak

data.overview: Quỷ Nhập Tràng 2 là tiền truyện của nhân vật Minh Như, trở về xưởng nhuộm gia đình sau nhiều năm bị xua đuổi. Tại đây, cô phải đối mặt với những hiện tượng ma quái cùng sự thật tàn khốc về cái chết của mẹ và giao ước đẫm máu năm xưa. Ác giả ác báo, liệu Minh Như có thoát khỏi vòng vây của quỷ dữ?
data.title: Quỷ Nhập Tràng 2

data.biography: Ward Kirby Horton (born 14 January 1976) is an American actor and stunt person. He is best known for playing John Form in the horror film Annabelle and Dr. Scott Strauss in CBS's Pure Genius.
data.name: Ward Horton

data.biography: 沃德·柯比·霍顿（Ward Kirby Horton，1976年1月14日-），美国演员、特技演员。他最出名的是在恐怖电影《安娜贝尔》中扮演约翰·福尔，在哥伦比亚广播公司的《纯天才》中扮演斯科特·施特劳斯博士。

data.biography: 沃德·柯比·霍頓（Ward Kirby Horton，1976 年 1 月 14 日-），美國演員、特技演員。他最出名的是在恐怖電影《詭娃安娜貝爾》中扮演約翰·福爾，在哥倫比亞廣播公司的《純天才》中扮演斯科特·施特勞斯博士。
data.name: 沃德·霍頓

data.biography:
Ward Kirby Horton, 14 Ocak 1976 tarihinde Morristown, New Jersey'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Ailesiyle birlikte North Carolina'ya taşınan ve burada bir at çiftliğinde büyüyen Horton, akademik eğitimini Wake Forest Üniversitesi'nde İşletme üzerine tamamladı. Mezuniyetinin ardından Kuzey Carolina'da bir yatırım bankasında varlık yönetimi danışmanı olarak finans sektöründe çalışmaya başlasa da, içindeki sahne sanatları tutkusu ağır bastı. Kariyerinde radikal bir değişikliğe giderek New York'a taşındı ve burada oyunculuk eğitimi almaya başladı.

New York'taki ilk yıllarında modellik yapan ve reklam filmlerinde rol alan Horton, oyunculuk yeteneğini geliştirmek için yoğun bir çaba sarf etti. Tiyatro sahnesine adım atarak Off-Broadway yapımlarında yer aldı; özellikle New York'un en uzun soluklu oyunlarından biri olan "Perfect Crime"daki performansı dikkat çekti. Ekran kariyerine ise 2000'lerin başında "Law & Order", "CSI: Miami", "Gossip Girl" ve "White Collar" gibi popüler televizyon dizilerindeki konuk oyunculuklarla başladı. Sinemadaki ilk dikkate değer işlerinden biri, Harrison Ford'un başrolünde olduğu "Extraordinary Measures" (2010) filmi olsa da, prestijli projelerdeki varlığı Martin Scorsese'nin yönettiği "Para Avcısı" (The Wolf of Wall Street) (2013) filmindeki rolüyle belirginleşti.

Ward Horton'ı dünya çapında geniş kitlelere tanıtan ve kariyerindeki en büyük kırılma noktası olan yapım, "The Conjuring" evreninin bir parçası olan ve büyük bir gişe başarısı elde eden korku filmi "Annabelle" (2014) oldu. Bu filmde John Form karakterine hayat vererek, şeytani bir oyuncak bebeğin musallat olduğu bir ailenin dramını başarıyla yansıttı ve korku sineması severlerin hafızasında yer etti. Bu rol, onun Hollywood stüdyo filmlerindeki başrol kapasitesini kanıtlamasını sağladı.

"Annabelle" filminin getirdiği başarının ardından televizyon dünyasında daha kalıcı roller üstlenmeye başlayan aktör, CBS yapımı tıbbi drama dizisi "Pure Genius"ta (2016-2017) Dr. Scott Strauss karakteriyle ana kadroda yer aldı. Sinemada ise Matt Damon ve Christian Bale'in başrollerini paylaştığı, Akademi Ödüllü biyografik drama "Ford v Ferrari" (2019) filminde rol alarak nitelikli yapımlarda yer almaya devam etti. Son dönemde ise HBO'nun büyük beğeni toplayan ve Julian Fellowes tarafından yaratılan dönem dizisi "The Gilded Age" (2022-günümüz) kadrosuna katıldı. Dizide 19. yüzyıl New York sosyetesinin önemli figürlerinden bankacı Charles Fane karakterini canlandırarak, dönem projelerindeki uyumunu ve oyunculuk olgunluğunu sergilemeyi sürdürmektedir.
Lionel Boyce is an American actor and writer, best known for his role as Marcus in the TV show The Bear. He was previously known as L-Boy in the alternative hip-hop group Odd Future.
data.name: Lionel Boyce
ไลโอเนล บอยซ์

data.biography:
张可颐 ，1970年3月20日出生于香港，香港影视女演员。

1989年，出演个人首部电影《英雄本色3：夕阳之歌》，从而进入演艺圈。1994年，她参加了香港小姐竞选，成为香港无线电视的合约艺人。1998年，凭借年代剧《难兄难弟之神探李奇》获得20世纪无线五大最难忘的女主角奖。2003年，凭借时装穿越剧《九五至尊》获得万千星辉颁奖典礼最佳女主角奖。2004年，主演清装宫斗剧《金枝欲孽》。2009年，主演时装情感剧《老公万岁》。2011年，主演时装剧《法证先锋III》。2015年，出演都市情感剧《北上广不相信眼泪》。
data.name: 张可颐

data.biography: Maggie Cheung Ho-Yee is a Hong Kong actress.
data.name: Maggie Cheung Ho-Yee

data.biography:
張可頤 ，1970 年 3 月 20 日出生於香港，香港影視女演員。

1989 年，出演個人首部電影《英雄本色 3：夕陽之歌》，從而進入演藝圈。1994 年，她參加了香港小姐競選，成為香港無線電視的合約藝人。1998 年，憑藉年代劇《難兄難弟之神探李奇》獲得 20 世紀無線五大最難忘的女主角獎。2003 年，憑藉時裝穿越劇《九五至尊》獲得萬千星輝頒獎典禮最佳女主角獎。2004 年，主演清裝宮鬥劇《金枝欲孽》。2009 年，主演時裝情感劇《老公萬歲》。2011 年，主演時裝劇《法證先鋒 III》。2015 年，出演都市情感劇《北上廣不相信眼淚》。
data.name: 張可頤

data.biography: Michael was born and raised in St. Petersburg, Florida. He spent most of his youth studying jazz music and attended North Texas State University on a scholarship. He played lead trumpet with Stan Kenton's 1979 Tour and appeared with Woody Herman and his Thundering Heard. After a car accident left him unable to play, Michael re-directed his creativity into acting. On the small screen, Michael starred in the series Something So Right, landed the leads in two television movies The Princess And The Marine and A Loss Of Innocence and recurred on 3rd Rock From The Sun as the high school gym coach. He has also made a number of guest starring appearances in series including That 70's Show, X-Files, Arli$$, The Drew Carey Show, Home Improvement, Seinfeld, Murphy Brown, Two Guys And A Girl, and 7th Heaven, where he played the father of a child with Tourette's Syndrome. An avid golfer, Michael is most recognizable for his role as Boone in Tin Cup with Kevin Costner. Additional big screen credits include Pearl Harbor, Collateral Damage, Anywhere But Here, Crimson Tide, Executive Decision, Phenomenon, Dreamweaver as James Spader's lawyer, and as Chicago White Sox third baseman Buck Weaver in Field Of Dreams. When not working, Michael spends every free minute golfing. Set on achieving one of his goals, playing on a PGA Senior tour. IMDb Mini Biography By: Christy Lawson
data.name: Michael Milhoan

data.biography: 迈克尔在佛罗里达州的圣彼得堡出生和长大。他年轻时的大部分时间都在学习爵士乐，并获得了奖学金进入北德克萨斯州立大学。他在斯坦·肯顿（Stan Kenton）的1979年巡回演唱会上担任主音小号，并与伍迪·赫尔曼（Woody Herman）和他的雷鸣听觉（Thundering Heard）一起出现。在一场车祸使他无法演出后，迈克尔将他的创造力重新引导到表演中。在小银幕上，迈克尔出演了电视剧《Something So Right》，在两部电视电影《公主与海军陆战队》和《失去纯真》中担任主角，并在《太阳的第三块石头》中再次担任高中体育教练。他还在一系列剧集中客串出演，包括 70 年代秀、X 档案、Arli$$、德鲁凯里秀、家居装修、宋飞正传、墨菲布朗、两个男人和一个女孩，以及 7th Heaven，在那里他扮演了一个患有妥瑞氏综合症的孩子的父亲。作为一名狂热的高尔夫球手，迈克尔最广为人知的是他与凯文·科斯特纳（Kevin Costner）一起在锡杯中饰演布恩。其他大银幕作品包括《珍珠港》、《附带损害》、《无处不在》、《深红之潮》、《行政决策》、《现象》、Dreamweaver 饰演 James Spader 的律师，以及在 Field Of Dreams 中饰演芝加哥白袜队三垒手 Buck Weaver。不工作时，迈克尔会把每一分钟的空闲时间都花在打高尔夫球上。他的目标是实现自己的目标之一，参加PGA高级巡回赛。
data.name: 迈克尔·米尔汉

data.biography: 邁克爾在佛羅裏達州的聖彼得堡出生和長大。他年輕時的大部分時間都在學習爵士樂，並獲得了獎學金進入北德克薩斯州立大學。他在斯坦·肯頓（Stan Kenton）的 1979 年巡迴演唱會上擔任主音小號，並與伍迪·赫爾曼（Woody Herman）和他的雷鳴聽覺（Thundering Heard）一起出現。在一場車禍使他無法演出後，邁克爾將他的創造力重新引導到表演中。在小銀幕上，邁克爾出演了電視劇《Something So Right》，在兩部電視電影《公主與海軍陸戰隊》和《失去純真》中擔任主角，並在《太陽的第三塊石頭》中再次擔任高中體育教練。他還在一系列劇集中客串出演，包括 70 年代秀、X 檔案、Arli$$、德魯凱里秀、家居裝修、宋飛正傳、墨菲布朗、兩個男人和一個女孩，以及 7th Heaven，在那裏他扮演了一個患有妥瑞氏綜合症的孩子的父親。作為一名狂熱的高爾夫球手，邁克爾最廣為人知的是他與凱文·科斯特納（Kevin Costner）一起在錫杯中飾演布恩。其他大銀幕作品包括《珍珠港》、《附帶損害》、《無處不在》、《深紅之潮》、《行政決策》、《現象》、Dreamweaver 飾演 James Spader 的律師，以及在 Field Of Dreams 中飾演芝加哥白襪隊三壘手 Buck Weaver。不工作時，邁克爾會把每一分鐘的空閒時間都花在打高爾夫球上。他的目標是實現自己的目標之一，參加 PGA 高級巡迴賽。
data.name: 邁克爾·米爾漢

data.biography: Katelyn Rose Downey (born 15 February 2009) is an Irish actress.
data.name: Katelyn Rose Downey

data.biography: Katelyn Rose Downey (* 15. Februar 2009) ist eine irische Schauspielerin.
凯特琳·罗斯·唐尼（Katelyn Rose Downey，2009年2月15日-）是一位爱尔兰女演员。
data.name: 凯特琳·罗斯·唐尼

data.biography:
Katelyn Rose Downey, 15 Şubat 2009 tarihinde Dublin, İrlanda'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Sanatla iç içe büyüyen Downey, oyunculuk dünyasına adım atmadan önce disiplinli bir çalışma gerektiren İrlanda dansı alanında üstün başarılar göstermiş ve Dünya Şampiyonası'nda ödül kazanmış yetenekli bir dansçıdır. Sahne disiplini ve fiziksel performans gerektiren dans geçmişi, onun oyunculuk kariyerine geçişinde önemli bir temel oluşturmuştur.

Profesyonel oyunculuk kariyerine hızlı ve etkileyici bir giriş yapan Downey, ilk büyük uluslararası çıkışını 2022 yapımı 20th Century Studios ve Disney+ ortak yapımı aksiyon-fantezi filmi "The Princess" ile gerçekleştirdi. Joey King'in başrolünü üstlendiği bu filmde, Prenses'in kız kardeşi Violet karakterine hayat verdi ve aksiyon ağırlıklı bir yapımda çocuk oyuncu olarak dikkat çekmeyi başardı.

Televizyon dünyasındaki varlığını, İrlanda yapımı suç ve gerilim dizisi "Clean Sweep" (2023) ile güçlendirdi. Bu dizide Caitlin Mohan rolünü üstlenerek Charlene McKenna ile birlikte kamera karşısına geçti ve dramatik oyunculuk yeteneğini sergiledi. Ancak Katelyn Rose Downey'i küresel çapta geniş kitlelere tanıtan asıl yapım, korku sinemasının en hasılatlı serilerinden biri olan "Conjuring" evreninin devam filmi "Dehşetin Yüzü 2" (The Nun II) (2023) oldu. Filmde, Fransız yatılı okulunda okuyan ve olayların merkezinde yer alan Sophie karakterini canlandırdı. Taissa Farmiga, Storm Reid ve Anna Popplewell gibi deneyimli isimlerle birlikte yer aldığı bu projedeki performansı, eleştirmenler ve izleyiciler tarafından beğeni topladı. Hem Avrupa yapımlarında hem de Hollywood blokbasterlarında yer alarak, kuşağının gelecek vadeden İrlandalı yıldızları arasında gösterilmektedir.
凱特琳·羅斯·唐尼（Katelyn Rose Downey，2009 年 2 月 15 日-）是一位愛爾蘭女演員。
data.name: 凱特琳·羅斯·唐尼

data.biography: Jane Methika Jiranorraphat, or Janeyeh, is a Thai-Taiwanese actor born to a Taiwanese father and Thai mother in Bangkok, Thailand. One of her two sisters, Pemika Jiranorraphat, is a model. Growing up, Jane attended Thai international schools and, in grade four, she attended school in Taiwan to practise her Chinese. In 2020, she graduated in Brand Communication from Bangkok University's Faculty of Communication Arts.  Before fully entering the industry, Jane competed in "Miss Teen Thailand 2014" and auditioned for JYP and YG in hopes of making it as a K-Pop idol. In 2015, she made her acting debut in the series "Love Sick Season 2".  Jane was previously a member of the project girl group SIZZY (formerly SISSY) formed by GMMTV in 2019. In 2023, they signed with Riser Music although they never released music under the label, ultimately disbanding on October 16, 2024, following the expiration of Jane's contract with GMMTV.
data.name: Methika Jiranorraphat
รมิดา จีรนรภัทร
ラミダー・ジーラノラパット

data.biography: Matthew Beard is a British actor and model.
data.name: Matthew Beard

data.biography:
Matthew Beard, 25 Mart 1989 tarihinde Londra, İngiltere'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Kariyerine henüz çocuk yaşta başlayan Beard, 1990'ların sonlarından itibaren çeşitli İngiliz televizyon dizilerinde ve filmlerinde roller alarak sektöre adım attı. Oyunculuk kariyerine bir süre ara vererek York Üniversitesi'nde İngiliz Edebiyatı eğitimi alması, onun entelektüel birikimini de yansıtan önemli bir adımdı. Eğitimi sonrası oyunculuğa tam zamanlı olarak geri döndü.

Kariyerinin ilk dönemlerindeki en dikkat çekici rollerinden biri, "And When Did You Last See Your Father?" (2007) filminde Colin Firth'ün canlandırdığı karakterin gençliğini oynamasıydı. Ancak ona uluslararası alanda tanınırlık getiren asıl çıkışı, 2009 yılında Lone Scherfig'in yönettiği ve Oscar'a aday gösterilen "Bir Eğitim" (An Education) filmiyle oldu. Bu filmdeki performansıyla eleştirmenlerin beğenisini kazandı ve gelecek vaat eden genç yetenekler arasında gösterilmeye başlandı.

Beard, 2014 yılında büyük başarı yakalayan ve birçok ödüle layık görülen "Yapay Oyun" (The Imitation Game) filminde, Alan Turing'in Bletchley Park'taki ekibinden biri olan matematikçi Peter Hilton'ı canlandırarak prestijli bir projede daha yer aldı. Ayrıca "The Riot Club" (2014) ve "Johnny English Strikes Again" (2018) gibi farklı türlerdeki filmlerde de rol alarak çok yönlülüğünü gösterdi.

Son yıllarda kariyerinin odağını televizyona kaydıran Beard, en önemli başrolünü BBC yapımı olan ve 1900'lerin başında geçen dönem dizisi "Vienna Blood"da (2019) üstlendi. Bu dizide Sigmund Freud'un öğrencisi, zeki ve genç doktor Max Liebermann karakterine hayat vererek geniş kitlelerce tanındı ve eleştirel başarı yakaladı. Ayrıca HBO'nun bilimkurgu komedi dizisi "Avenue 5" (2020-2022) ve "The Pembrokeshire Murders" (2021) gibi dizilerde de önemli rollerde yer aldı. Oyunculuğun yanı sıra, Bill Nighy ve Carey Mulligan ile birlikte rol aldığı "Skylight" oyunuyla West End tiyatrosunda da sahneye çıkmıştır.

Genellikle canlandırdığı zeki, düşünceli ve zaman zaman naif karakterlerle tanınan Matthew Beard, çocuk oyunculuktan başarılı bir şekilde yetişkin rollerine geçiş yapan, hem sinema hem de televizyonda saygın bir yer edinen yetenekli bir İngiliz aktördür.

Alyson Lee Hannigan (born March 24, 1974) is an American actress and television presenter. She is best known for her roles as Willow Rosenberg in the television series Buffy the Vampire Slayer (1997–2003), as Lily Aldrin in the sitcom How I Met Your Mother (2005–2014) for which she won a People's Choice Award in 2009, and as Michelle Flaherty in the American Pie film series (1999–2012). Since 2016, Hannigan has hosted the television show Penn & Teller: Fool Us. She also provides the voice of Claire Clancy in the Disney Junior animated series Fancy Nancy (2018–present).
data.name: Alyson Hannigan

data.biography:
💥Элисон Ли Ханниган. Родилась в 1974-ом году в Вашингтоне, Колумбия, США. Была единственным ребёнком в семье. Отец работал водителем грузовика, а мать была агентом по недвижимости. Училась в Калифорнийском государственном университете в Нортридже. Работает актрисой и телеведущей. С 2003-го замужем за актёром Алексисом Денисофом, у пары 2-ое дочерей Сатьяна и Кива

🏆Главные награды🏆: Сатурн (2002) [Баффи - истребительница вампиров]

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «Баффи - истребительница вампиров» (1997), «Американский пирог» (1999), «Как я встретил вашу маму» (2005)

⭐Интересный факт⭐: Элисон страдает аллергией на кошек несмотря на то, что её героиня в сериале «Баффи - истребительница вампиров» обожала их
data.name: Элисон Ханниган

data.biography: Η Άλισον Χάνιγκαν (Alyson Lee Hannigan, 24 Μαρτίου 1974) είναι Αμερικανίδα ηθοποιός. Είναι ιδιαίτερα γνωστή για τους ρόλους της ως Willow Rosenberg στην τηλεοπτική σειρά Buffy the Vampire Slayer (1997-2003), ως Lily Aldrin στην κωμική σειρά How I Met Your mother (2005-2014), και ως Μισέλ Φλάχερτι στη σειρά ταινιών American Pie (1999-2012)

Alyson Lee Hannigan (24 de marzo de 1974), más conocida como Alyson Hannigan, es una actriz conocida por sus papeles de Willow Rosenberg en Buffy, la cazavampiros, Michelle Flaherty en todas las películas de la saga American Pie, y Lily Aldrin en How I Met Your Mother.

Alyson Lee Hannigan (* 24. März 1974 in Washington, D.C.) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin.

Bekannt wurde sie zunächst durch den Film Meine Stiefmutter ist ein Alien und später die Serie Buffy – Im Bann der Dämonen. In der Serie spielte sie sieben Jahre lang in insgesamt 144 Folgen die Hexe und Computerspezialistin Willow Rosenberg. Darüber hinaus verkörperte sie die Rolle der Michelle in vier American-Pie-Filmen.

Danach spielte Hannigan in einem Londoner Theater in einer Bühnenversion von Harry und Sally die Titelfigur Sally und war 2005 in einigen Episoden der Serie Veronica Mars als Trina Echolls zu sehen. Im Herbst 2005 startete in den USA ihre neue Serie How I Met Your Mother, in der sie bis zum Serienfinale im Jahr 2014 an der Seite von Jason Segel die Erzieherin Lily Aldrin in 206 Folgen spielte. Im Februar 2006 folgte ein Auftritt als Julia Jones im Film Date Movie, einer Parodie auf romantische Komödien.

Quelle: Wikipedia

艾丽森·汉尼根（Alyson Lee Hannigan），1974年03月24日出生于华盛顿，美国演员，主要作品有《山丘之王》。

因饰演《吸血鬼猎人巴菲》的Willow Roseberg、《老爸老妈的浪漫史》的莉莉·艾尔德林以及电影《美国派》系列中的米歇尔而出名。
data.name: 艾丽森·汉尼根

data.biography:
Alyson Lee Hannigan, née le 24 mars 1974 à Washington, DC, est une actrice américaine.

Elle se fait connaître mondialement, grâce à son interprétation du personnage de Willow Rosenberg dans la série télévisée fantastique Buffy contre les vampires (1997-2003). Par la suite, elle confirme sur le petit écran grâce au rôle de Lily Aldrin dans la sitcom comique How I Met Your Mother (2005-2014).

Au cinéma, elle est célèbre pour avoir joué Michelle Flaherty dans la saga cinématographique American Pie (1999-2003 et puis 2012), Amour, mariage et petits tracas (2011), mais aussi récemment dans le film à succès Flora & Ulysse (2021) par Disney+.

Alyson Lee Hannigan (Washington, 1974. március 24. –) amerikai színésznő.

Ismertebb szerepei közé tartozik Willow Rosenberg a Buffy, a vámpírok réme (1997–2003) című sorozatban, Michelle Flaherty az Amerikai pite filmekben (1999–2012), valamint Lily Aldrin az Így jártam anyátokkal (2005–2014) című szituációs komédiában.

Alyson Lee Hannigan (doğum tarihi: 24 Mart 1974), Amerikalı bir aktris ve televizyon sunucusudur. En çok, Buffy the Vampire Slayer (Buffy: Vampir Avcısı) televizyon dizisinde Willow Rosenberg rolüyle, How I Met Your Mother sitcomunda Lily Aldrin karakteriyle (bu rolüyle 2009'da People's Choice Award kazandı) ve American Pie film serisindeki Michelle Flaherty karakteriyle tanınmaktadır. 2016'dan beri Hannigan, Penn & Teller: Fool Us adlı televizyon programını sunmaktadır. Ayrıca Disney Junior'un Fancy Nancy (2018-günümüz) animasyon serisinde Claire Clancy'nin sesiyle de katkıda bulunmaktadır.

艾麗森·漢妮根（Alyson Lee Hannigan），1974 年 03 月 24 日出生於華盛頓，美國演員，主要作品有《山丘之王》。

因飾演《美女與彊屍有個約會》的 Willow Roseberg、《老爸老媽的浪漫史》的莉莉·艾爾德林以及電影《美國處男》系列中的米歇爾而出名。
data.name: 艾麗森·漢妮根

data.biography:
Perth Tanapon Sukumpantanasan is a Thai actor and singer born in Bangkok. He graduated from Saint Dominic School and is currently a student at Srinakharinwirot University (SWU), majoring in Innovative Media Arts and Acting and Director Training.

Perth made his acting debut as Breeze in the 2017 series "Please... Seiyng Reiyk Wiyyan". He rose to prominence portraying Ae in the series "Love by chance".

He was part of the boy band "Tempt" which disbanded in 2020. He was one of the artists in a ten-member boy band "Boyfriends." Season 1 partnered with Ritz. Their first single is titled "อาการงี้ (Hello Doctor)".

Tanapon left his management AttractorTH along with Plan Rathavit and Gun Napat on July 13th, 2020. Worked as a freelancer. On April 4th, 2022 GMMTV announced on their social media platforms that Perth had joined the company as one of their artists.
data.name: Tanapon Sukumpantanasan
ธนพนธ์ สุขุมพันธนาสาร
タナポン・スクムパンタナーサーン

data.biography:
Tanapon Sukumpantanasan, conhecido mundialmente como Perth, é um dos atores mais influentes da indústria BL tailandesa, agenciado pela GMMTV. Ele iniciou sua carreira com um estrondo em 2018, ao protagonizar o fenômeno global "Love by Chance", onde sua interpretação como Ae o transformou em uma estrela internacional aos 17 anos.

Após um período como freelancer e passagens pelas bandas TEMPT e Boyfriends, Perth assinou com a GMMTV em 2022. Na agência, protagonizou a série "Dangerous Romance" (2023). Em 2024, iniciou uma nova e bem-sucedida fase em sua carreira ao ser escalado como o protagonista Yark-Fah em "Perfect 10 Liners", projeto que marcou o início de sua parceria oficial com Santa Pongsapak. Além da atuação, Perth é cantor sob o selo Riser Music e estuda Direção e Atuação na Universidade Srinakharinwirot (SWU).
data.name: Perth Tanapon Sukumpantanasan

data.biography:
塔纳朋·苏库潘塔纳汕（ธนพนธ์ สุขุมพันธนาสาร），艺名Perth，2001年3月20日出生于泰国曼谷，泰籍华裔男演员、歌手，男子乐队TEMPT成员，毕业于诗纳卡宁威洛大学社会传播创新学院电影与数字媒体专业，主修表演与导演。

2017年通过悬疑剧《please灵魂之声》出道。2018年因主演同性校园剧《不期而爱》崭露头角，随后出演《不期而爱2》《危险罗曼史》等作品。2019年客串出演《待到重逢时》《我的秘密新娘》等剧集。2022年签约GMMTV后，主演《我的足球教练》《骨肉相残》等剧集。2024年主演同性爱情剧《男神编码》，2025年参演《良师男友》。
data.name: 王俊勇

data.biography:
塔納朋·蘇庫潘塔納汕（ธนพนธ์ สุขุมพันธนาสาร），藝名 Perth，2001 年 3 月 20 日出生於泰國曼谷，泰籍華裔男演員、歌手，男子樂隊 TEMPT 成員，畢業於詩納卡寧威洛大學社會傳播創新學院電影與數字媒體專業，主修表演與導演。

2017 年通過懸疑劇《please 靈魂之聲》出道。2018 年因主演同性校園劇《不期而愛》嶄露頭角，隨後出演《不期而愛 2》《危險羅曼史》等作品。2019 年客串出演《待到重逢時》《我的秘密新娘》等劇集。2022 年簽約 GMMTV 後，主演《我的足球教練》《骨肉相殘》等劇集。2024 年主演同性愛情劇《男神編碼》，2025 年參演《良師男友》。
data.name: 王俊勇

data.biography: 梁达伟，知名配音演员。毕业于上海戏剧学院， 曾先后取得该校媒体创意专业学士学位与社会表演学硕士学位，并于纽约电影学院（纽约校区） 影视表演专业进修。目前为瞬心文化签约艺人。在热播综艺《声临其境》中为岳云鹏等明星提供声音指导，在现象级广播剧《残次品》中为主角陆必行配音，收获一致好评。代表作品有：《残次品》、《武庚纪》、《魔兽世界》、《风暴英雄》、《守望先锋》、《帝王攻略》、《白夜玲珑》、《拾又之国》、《玩命直播》等。
data.name: 梁达伟

data.biography: Liang Dawei (梁达伟) is a Chinese voice actor. He is a graduate student at the Shanghai Theater Academy. In 2014, he participated in the "Voice of the Translator" film and television translation and dubbing competition, jointly organized by the Shanghai Fanyijia Association, the Shanghai Film Association, and Shanghai Film Translation Factory Co.,Ltd. In 2016, he dubbed the animated film I am NeZha (2016), directed by Zhan Shu. On February 1, 2022, he participated in the dubbing of the animated film Run, Tiger, Run! (2022).
data.name: Liang Dawei

data.biography: 梁達偉，知名配音演員。畢業於上海戲劇學院， 曾先後取得該校媒體創意專業學士學位與社會表演學碩士學位，並於紐約電影學院（紐約校區） 影視表演專業進修。目前為瞬心文化簽約藝人。在熱播綜藝《聲臨其境》中為嶽雲鵬等明星提供聲音指導，在現象級廣播劇《殘次品》中為主角陸必行配音，收穫一致好評。代表作品有：《殘次品》、《武庚紀》、《魔獸世界》、《風暴英雄》、《守望先鋒》、《帝王攻略》、《白夜玲瓏》、《拾又之國》、《玩命直播》等。
data.name: 梁達偉
Trường Phong Phá Lãng
data.overview: "Trường Phong Phá Lãng" là bộ phim gián điệp thời kỳ Trung Hoa Dân Quốc do Diêu Hiểu đạo diễn, Ông Lương Bình biên kịch. Với sự tham gia của các diễn viên Vương Nhất Bác, Lý Thấm, Vương Dương. Bộ phim này kể về câu chuyện của Ngụy Nhược Lai (do Vương Nhất Bác thủ vai), là một thiên tài tài chính là nhân viên cấp thấp của Ngân hàng Trung ương Quốc Dân Đảng từ năm 1929 đến năm 1934. Nhược Lai là đệ tử của cố vấn cấp cao Thẩm Đồ Nam (do Vương Dương thủ vai). Sống trong thời buổi khó khăn, do dự không biết nên lựa chọn con đường nào, thì anh gặp em gái của Thẩm Tú Nam - Đảng viên Đảng Cộng sản Thẩm Cận Chân (do Lý Thấm thủ vai). Do chịu ảnh hưởng từ cô, anh dần dần thiết lập niềm tin cộng sản của mình và trở thành một nhà tài chính nắm quyền dẫn đầu mặt trận tài chính của Đảng.

data.biography:
Lee Na Young is a South Korean actress, best known for her leading roles in TV Series “Ruler of Your Own World” (2002) and “Ireland” (2004). She is also known for her leading roles in “Someone Special” (2004), “Maundy Thursday” (2006), and “Romance is a Bonus Book” (2019). Aside from acting, Lee is also known for appearing in numerous commercials.

Lee married actor Won Bin on May 30, 2015, in a private small ceremony in a wheat field near an inn in Won Bin's hometown, Jeongseon County, Gangwon Province, South Korea. The couple belong to the same talent agency (Eden 9) and reportedly began dating in August 2012 (though Eden 9 only confirmed the relationship in July 2013). A press release from Eden 9 on December 19, 2015 announced that Lee had given birth to the couple's first child, a son.
data.name: Lee Na-young

data.biography: Dai Gaozheng is a Chinese actor managed by Beijing SG-Culture Media. He was born in Neijiang, Sichuan, China. He graduated from the Central Academy of Drama, Acting Department, Class of 2013.
data.name: Dai Gaozheng

data.biography: 代高政，1996年6月18日出生於四川省內江市，畢業於中央戲劇學院，中國內地影視男演員。
data.name: 代高政

data.biography: 代高政，1996 年 6 月 18 日出生於四川省內江市，畢業於中央戲劇學院，中國內地影視男演員。
data.name: 代高政

data.biography:
Miharu Hanai (花井 美春, Hanai Miharu, February 8, 1998) is a Japanese voice actress from Chitose, Hokkaido. She is affiliated with DAX Production. She was formerly affiliated with IAM Agency

At first, she wanted to join the Takarazuka Revue because she liked singing and expressing herself in front of people, but that dream didn't come true. Later, when she was thinking about her future, she got fascinated after watching the TV anime K-ON! and found a new dream. She then decided to become a voice actress and studied acting at the International Media Gakuin (a subsidiary of the IAM Group). After graduating, she joined IAM Agency and made her debut in 2017 as Sassa Kurasaki in the TV anime Armed Girl's Machiavellism.

She left IAM Agency on January 31, 2025 and joined DAX Production on April 1.
data.name: Miharu Hanai

data.biography: 花井美春是日本的女性声优。
data.name: 花井美春

data.biography:
Miharu Hanai (花井 美春, Hanai Miharu, 8 de febrero de 1998) es una actriz de voz japonesa de Chitose, Hokkaido. Está afiliada a DAX Production. Anteriormente perteneció a IAM Agency.

Al principio, quería unirse a Takarazuka Revue porque le gustaba cantar y expresarse frente a la gente. Sin embargo, este sueño no se hizo realidad y mientras pensaba sobre su futuro vio el anime TV y quedó fascinada. Entonces decidió convertirse en seiyuu (actriz de voz) y estudió doblaje en la International Media Gakuin (una filial del Grupo IAM). Después de graduarse, se unió a IAM Agency e hizo su debut en 2017 como Sassa Kurasaki en el anime televisivo Busou Shoujo Machiavellianism.

Dejó IAM Agency el 31 de enero de 2025 y se incorporó a DAX Production el 1 de abril del mismo año.
data.name: Miharu Hanai

data.biography: 花井美春是日本的女性聲優。出身於北海道千歲市，所屬公司為 DAX Production。姊姊為聲優鈴木愛奈。
data.name: 花井美春
มิฮารุ ฮานาอิ

data.biography: 花井美春是日本的女性聲優，北海道出身。IAM Agency 所屬。姊姊是同為聲優的鈴木愛奈。
data.name: 花井美春

data.biography:
牛莉，中国空军电视艺术中心演员，毕业于解放军艺术学院。

牛莉从影前是名运动员，1986年获得全国第一届女子花样游泳团体冠军。1990年获得全军射击冠军。1991年9月，牛莉首次出演电影《大决战》。2000年6月，主演古装轻喜剧《绝色双娇》。2001年，凭借主演的家庭情感剧《空镜子》提名第22届中国电视剧飞天奖优秀女演员奖。2006年，参演创业励志剧《闯关东》。2011年，主演的相声剧《还钱》获得兔年春晚观众最喜爱的春晚节目小品类一等奖。2013年，凭借主演的家庭伦理剧《新女婿时代》获得首届“央视中国电视剧年度明星盛典”十佳演员称号。2015年，凭借主演的农民史诗剧《老农民》获得第11届中美电影节最佳女主角奖。2017年，主演都市情感电视剧《美好生活》。
data.name: 牛莉

data.biography:
牛莉，中國空軍電視藝術中心演員，畢業於解放軍藝術學院。

牛莉從影前是名運動員，1986 年獲得全國第一屆女子花樣遊泳團體冠軍。1990 年獲得全軍射擊冠軍。1991 年 9 月，牛莉首次出演電影《大決戰》。2000 年 6 月，主演古裝輕喜劇《絕色雙嬌》。2001 年，憑藉主演的家庭情感劇《空鏡子》提名第 22 屆中國電視劇飛天獎優秀女演員獎。2006 年，參演創業勵志劇《闖關東》。2011 年，主演的相聲劇《還錢》獲得兔年春晚觀眾最喜愛的春晚節目小品類一等獎。2013 年，憑藉主演的家庭倫理劇《新女婿時代》獲得首屆“央視中國電視劇年度明星盛典”十佳演員稱號。2015 年，憑藉主演的農民史詩劇《老農民》獲得第 11 屆中美電影節最佳女主角獎。2017 年，主演都市情感電視劇《美好生活》。
data.name: 牛莉
